data.content: Implemented src/lib/history-debug-prompt.ts with buildDebugPrompt() and summarizeSessionEntries(), added unit coverage in src/lib/__tests__/history-debug-prompt.test.ts, and verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build on branch work/foolery-59fb-impl (commit deb3d8859faf).
